title: Add M5 faction and governance hooks
summary: Add decomposed faction facts and governance hooks for event legality, policy pressure and strategy variation without a monolithic political director.
acceptance: FactionFactStore owns decomposed legal trade debt legitimacy fear/memory and known-claim lanes with versioned source events
GovernanceHookStore owns council post authority temporary policy authority enforcement capacity legitimacy source and risk flags
Faction and governance hooks feed event legality town-rule pressure and anomaly context through bounded versioned queries
UI summaries and text templates are derived and cannot own faction consequences or governance authority
Focused tests cover fact mutations bounded queries policy hook legality stale basis rejection structured reasons and no single mood-number authority

history.details: Created by WM-0072 M5 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Add M5 faction and governance owner hooks needed by anomaly, season and strategy content without implementing a full campaign simulator.
forbiddenPaths: full faction campaign election simulator or diplomacy UI
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: faction standing collapses to one scalar; store lanes must remain decomposed.
Risk: governance hooks bypass obligations or town rules; existing owner stores remain authority.
Risk: political logic becomes director-owned hidden state; hooks must be explicit owner facts.
benchmarkImpact: Adds faction/governance fact counts candidate visits stale-basis rejects and conflict metrics; baseline update waits for WM-0083.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before changing governance ownership or public content schema.
rollbackModel: Revert M5 faction/governance stores, tests, content schema hooks and docs; keep anomaly roster and anomaly rules intact.
ownerGate: Keep faction and governance facts decomposed and versioned
Do not bypass Chronicle obligations or town-rule authority
Use bounded queries with structured reasons
Block on public protocol save schema dependency UI authority or M6 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Faction/governance ownership affects simulation architecture and strategy authority.
